description: Fix hex task list: agent column always empty and tasks not grouped by swarm

specs.description: task list shows agent ID when a task is assigned
specs.given: A swarm task with agent_id 'claude-abc123' assigned via PATCH /api/hexflo/tasks/{id}
specs.then: The Agent column shows 'claude-abc12' (truncated to 14 chars)

specs.description: task list groups tasks under their swarm name
specs.given: Two swarms each with multiple tasks
specs.then: Tasks from each swarm are contiguous rows — swarm A tasks appear together, then swarm B tasks

specs.description: task list fetches from /api/hexflo/tasks flat endpoint
specs.given: hex-nexus is running with tasks registered via HexFlo
specs.then: The CLI calls GET /api/hexflo/tasks (not /api/swarms/active) and all tasks are returned with full fields including agent_id

specs.description: task list handles tasks with no agent assigned
specs.given: A task in pending status with no agent_id
specs.then: The Agent column shows empty string (not '-' or 'null')

specs.description: task list shows helpful message when no tasks exist
specs.given: No active swarms or tasks in hex-nexus
specs.then: Output is '⬡ No tasks found' and exit code is 0

specs.description: task list does NOT show swarm_id column — swarm name is sufficient
specs.then: The Swarm column shows the human-readable swarm name, not the UUID swarm_id
